chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Spl. STRA 153 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.14 2. For hearing of main case 3. For hearing of CMA No.3493/2024 26.01.2026 Ms. Fauzia Rasheed, advocate for the applicant Mr. Faheem Ali Memon advocate files vakalatnama on behalf of respondent which is taken on record. Pursuant to order dated 12.01.2026, it is jointly stated that it may be in the interest of justice and revenue that the impugned judgment be set aside and the matter be remanded back to the learned Tribunal for adjudication afresh in accordance with law expeditiously, preferably within 90 days. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 47 subsection 5 of Sales Tax Act, 1990. Judge Judge Amjad
